title: UniCredit CEO says taking control of Commerzbank ‘not the expected scenario’
summary_full: The Italian lender is making a takeover bid for German rival Commerzbank, despite pushback in Germany.
summary_public: The Italian lender is making a takeover bid for German rival Commerzbank, despite pushback in Germany.
